title: SearchConvertQueryResponse
description: SearchConvertQueryResponse schema from Censys Platform API

alternative_queries.description: Alternative queries that may be used. For example, a query that includes web results in addition to host results.

converted_query.description: The original query, converted to CenQL syntax. This may be empty if unable to translate the query.

errors.description: The error messages if the query could not be converted.

original_query.description: The original Censys Search Language query.

targets.description: The types of Platform data records (host, cert, and web) that can be targeted by the converted query. Note: Does not include targets that could be returned due to full-document search. This may be empty if the query is a match-all for full-document search query.
